headline: Is It Time To Reassess D.R. Horton (DHI) After Recent Housing Demand Headlines
summary: If you are wondering whether D.R. Horton’s current share price still offers value, you will want to look past the headlines and focus on what different valuation approaches are really saying about the stock. The stock last closed at US$147.91, with returns of 1.6% over the past week, a decline of 1.4% over 30 days, a 1.5% gain year to date, and a 26.4% return over 1 year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 32.3% and 67.6% respectively. Recent coverage around US housing demand,...
